sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀλίσγεμα

- Transliteration: Alisgema

- Phonetic: al-is'-ghem-ah

- Definition:

1. pollution, condemnation

- Origin: from alisgeo (to soil)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: From ἀλισγέω alisgeō (to soil); (ceremonial) defilement: - pollution.
